1. Importing Libraries¶

In [2]:
# importing libraries

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from sklearn.model_selection import GroupShuffleSplit, GroupKFold
from xgboost import XGBRegressor
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score, mean_squared_error
from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Set aesthetic styling
plt.style.use('seaborn-v0_8-whitegrid')
sns.set_context("notebook", font_scale=1.2)
sns.set_palette("colorblind")

2. Dataset import¶

In [3]:
# both the team members initally extrated differnet features which were then merged into master_dataset_ultimate.csv
df = pd.read_csv("master_dataset_ultimate.csv")
df['spatial_group'] = df['Latitude'].astype(str) + "_" + df['Longitude'].astype(str)
targets = ['Total Alkalinity', 'Electrical Conductance', 'Dissolved Reactive Phosphorus']

print(f"Master Dataset Shape: {df.shape}")
df.head()

3. Exploratory Data Analysis¶

In [29]:
def eda(df, targets):
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(22, 6))
    for i, target in enumerate(targets):
        plot_df = df.dropna(subset=[target, 'Latitude', 'Longitude'])
        sc = axes[i].scatter(plot_df['Longitude'], plot_df['Latitude'], 
                             c=plot_df[target], cmap='viridis', s=25, alpha=0.7)
        axes[i].set_title(f'Spatial Map: {target}', fontweight='bold')
        plt.colorbar(sc, ax=axes[i])
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    key_proxies = ['perc_barren', 'perc_urban', 'carbonate_index', 'topographic_slope', 'ppt_6mo']
    available = [c for c in key_proxies + targets if c in df.columns]
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 10))
    sns.heatmap(df[available].corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', center=0, square=True)
    plt.title("Biogeochemical Proxy Correlation Analysis", fontweight='bold')
    plt.show()
eda(df, targets)

4. Modeling¶

In [30]:
# We tested all the lightgbm and catboost but the results were poor so we went ahead with xgboost
# encoding non-numeric features
df_encoded = df.copy()
for col in df_encoded.columns:
    if col not in targets and df_encoded[col].dtype == 'object':
        df_encoded[col] = pd.factorize(df_encoded[col])[0]

features = [c for c in df_encoded.columns if c not in targets + ['Latitude', 'Longitude', 'Sample Date', 'spatial_group']]

def train_robust_model(target_name):
    print(f"Training Robust Engine for: {target_name}...")
    df_target = df_encoded.dropna(subset=[target_name]).copy()
    X, y = df_target[features], df_target[target_name]
    groups = df.loc[df_target.index, 'spatial_group']

    gss = GroupShuffleSplit(n_splits=1, test_size=0.2, random_state=42)
    train_idx, test_idx = next(gss.split(X, y, groups))
    X_train, X_test = X.iloc[train_idx], X.iloc[test_idx]
    y_train, y_test = y.iloc[train_idx], y.iloc[test_idx]

    X_train = X_train.fillna(X_train.median())
    X_test = X_test.fillna(X_train.median())
    
    #parameters extracted through grid search from a different file
    params = {
        'max_depth': 2,
        'learning_rate': 0.05,
        'n_estimators': 300,
        'reg_lambda': 50,
        'subsample': 0.8,
        'random_state': 42
    }
    
    model = XGBRegressor(**params)
    model.fit(X_train, y_train)
    
    preds = model.predict(X_test)
    r2 = r2_score(y_test, preds)
    print(f"Spatial Holdout R2: {r2:.4f}")
    return model, y_test, preds

results = {t: train_robust_model(t) for t in targets}

Training Robust Engine for: Total Alkalinity...
Spatial Holdout R2: 0.7172
Training Robust Engine for: Electrical Conductance...
Spatial Holdout R2: 0.7528
Training Robust Engine for: Dissolved Reactive Phosphorus...
Spatial Holdout R2: 0.5049

5. Performance Evaluation & Important features¶

In [25]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(22, 6))
for i, target in enumerate(targets):
    model, y_true, y_pred = results[target]
    axes[i].scatter(y_true, y_pred, alpha=0.5, color='teal')
    axes[i].plot([min(y_true), max(y_true)], [min(y_true), max(y_true)], 'r--')
    axes[i].set_title(f'Evaluation: {target}')
    axes[i].set_xlabel('Actual')
    axes[i].set_ylabel('Predicted')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(12, 18))
for i, target in enumerate(targets):
    model = results[target][0]
    feat_imp = pd.Series(model.feature_importances_, index=features).sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
    sns.barplot(x=feat_imp.values, y=feat_imp.index, ax=axes[i], palette='magma')
    axes[i].set_title(f'Top Drivers for {target}')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
